best_edges.edge: VALID_0DTE pullback continuation remains the core engine
best_edges.evidence: pullback_long leads profile PnL with 31 trades, $2415.3 PnL, 252.47 PnL/exposure hour, 100% win rate, no slow >=12h trades, and worst MAE contained to -403.2 in latest run.

best_edges.edge: 1DTE-only breakout fallback is productive despite higher average MAE
best_edges.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY produced 20 trades and $1305.0 PnL with no slow trades. Prior 1DTE quality tightening hurt score by -355 to -594 and reduced net profit, so blunt tightening is not supported.

best_edges.edge: Charm-pin pullback has fast profitable throughput but isolated tail heat
best_edges.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced 34 trades, $1237.7 PnL, median hold 5.3 minutes, and average MAE -74.3, but owns the global -527 MAE. This is a split/classifier problem, not a broad disable candidate.

best_edges.edge: Charm-wall breakaway convex payoff is real but sample is small
best_edges.evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long produced 5 trades, $985.6 PnL, 234.36 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 146.2, and no slow trades. The prior exit-compression test reduced net profit by -146.7, so preserve the convex target unless a split proves better.

best_edges.edge: Squeeze continuation is clean enough to keep, but upside tuning appears saturated
best_edges.evidence: squeeze_long produced 10 trades, $721.0 PnL, worst MAE -208.25, and no slow trades. Prior squeeze upside changes were accepted or flat, with latest leader already unchanged by the cap probe.

broken_edges.evidence: The extended-vwap-rejection near-miss family covers all 24 bad-MAE rows, but extended VWAP winners also contribute 18 trades and $674.9 with median MAE -14.875 and median hold 1.725 minutes.
broken_edges.problem: Extended-above-VWAP state is both an edge and a tail source; global distance caps would likely destroy protected fast winners.

broken_edges.evidence: Worst charm-pin trade had ES-VWAP 26.20, VWAP acceleration -0.015, pullback-from-high 9.75, no positive progress before MAE, and 80.3 minute hold, while the profile median hold is only 5.3 minutes.
broken_edges.problem: Charm-pin high-extension/rejection tails are not separable cleanly with a single static quality threshold.

broken_edges.evidence: Direct 1DTE local quality gates on es-structure, VWAP slope, forward DEX, and target cap reduced score and net profit in multiple runs.
broken_edges.problem: The 1DTE edge is sensitive to blunt breakout quality tightening; new 1DTE research should use companion routing or state split, not stricter breakout_long_1dte thresholds.

broken_edges.evidence: late_day_pin_fade, negative_gamma_momentum_long, trend_day_pullback_long, wall_reclaim_long, wall_breakout_retest_long, and breakout_long are router-listed but disabled or zero-trade in latest context.
broken_edges.problem: Dead active-router concepts have no latest positive evidence; optimizing them now would add noise unless testing a deliberate dormant/regime activation.

broken_edges.evidence: No-0DTE fallback contributed only 6 trades and $370.2 total, with STALE_0DTE pullback_long_no_0dte at only 83.22 PnL/exposure hour and breakout_long_no_0dte stale sample at 40.51 PnL/exposure hour.
broken_edges.problem: Fallback sample is too small and lower efficiency than core VALID_0DTE; use as robustness insurance, not next expansion source.

market_regime_read: The current leader is a clean long-only momentum/pullback tape over a short 12.3 day sample: 107 completed trades, $7125.8 net PnL, 0.4% drawdown, zero realized losses, zero slow >=12h trades, and 196.98 PnL/exposure hour. The apparent 100% win rate is not the edge by itself; the real edge is fast recovery and take-profit completion under positive option/ES structure states. Tail risk remains hidden in MAE, especially the -527 charm-pin entry and several -375 to -403 delayed-recovery trades. Since all top leaderboard configs are identical or near-identical, the next new-regime work should discover profile splits and data-state routing edges rather than overfit another small threshold nudge.

new_strategy_ideas.edge: Separate high-extension charm-pin entries that fail early progress from fast extended-VWAP winners.
new_strategy_ideas.failure_mode: A static config proxy may block the clean extended-VWAP winner cluster that has median MAE around -15 and fast exits.
new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.required_data: Intratrade path features within first 1-5 minutes, ES-VWAP extension, VWAP acceleration, pullback-from-high, rolling-high distance, entry veto reasons, and profile label.
new_strategy_ideas.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long entry with high ES-VWAP extension or recent-high rejection plus no early positive movement / no MFE-before-MAE.
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast-winner count.

new_strategy_ideas.edge: Create a separate 1DTE pullback/reclaim route instead of tightening breakout_long_1dte.
new_strategy_ideas.failure_mode: Router ordering may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte entries, or the profile may be unreachable if trigger overlap is too narrow.
new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
new_strategy_ideas.required_data: VALID_1DTE_ONLY entries with ES pullback/reclaim distances, VWAP slope, ADX/RSI state, option map quality, and profile selection reason.
new_strategy_ideas.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than breakout continuation.
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= current $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.86, and total net profit remains >=98% of leader.

new_strategy_ideas.edge: Split pullback_long into clean continuation vs delayed deep-heat recoveries.
new_strategy_ideas.failure_mode: Weak ES structure also appears in profitable pullbacks, so broad structure floors can suppress the main PnL engine.
new_strategy_ideas.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Companion Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.required_data: Early path MFE/MAE timing, ES structure distances, VWAP acceleration, reclaim samples, setup score, and profile-level outcome labels.
new_strategy_ideas.trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback_long entries with weak structure distances, low VWAP acceleration, and no early MFE before adverse movement.
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Retain >=90% pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -403.2 toward <= -300 and keeping total PnL/exposure hour flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.edge: Use dormant pin-avoid concepts to capture high charm-wall/charm-pin risk without disabling the core profiles.
new_strategy_ideas.failure_mode: Dormant profile may be unreachable or may cannibalize clean charm-pin/charm-wall winners instead of isolating bad tails.
new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Activation Probe
new_strategy_ideas.required_data: Router activation for inactive pin-avoid concept plus profile-level PnL, trade count, MAE, and overlap against charm_pin_pullback_long and charm_wall_breakaway_long.
new_strategy_ideas.trigger: VALID_0DTE high charm wall or pin-risk state currently routed into charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long.
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE, while total net profit remains >=98% of leader and protected fast-winner count is not materially reduced.

next_experiments.config_bias: Activate the dormant pullback_long_1dte route as a companion, not a replacement, and bias it toward pullback/reclaim state. Keep breakout_long_1dte protected unless routing proves the companion captures distinct trades.
next_experiments.goal: Discover whether VALID_1DTE_ONLY is multiple regimes rather than one breakout fallback.
next_experiments.hypothesis: The 20-trade 1DTE bucket is profitable but high-MAE; a pullback/reclaim companion can improve MAE without repeating failed breakout quality tightening.
next_experiments.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Activation
next_experiments.primary_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= $1305 with 1DTE average MAE better than -123.86 and total score not below leader by more than noise.
next_experiments.risk: Router cannibalization of profitable breakout_long_1dte trades.

next_experiments.config_bias: Test a router activation of a dormant pin-avoid concept around charm/pin conditions, with minimal initial tuning and strict attribution reporting versus charm_pin_pullback_long and charm_wall_breakaway_long.
next_experiments.goal: Find a config-only profile split for charm/pin tail states.
next_experiments.hypothesis: Some charm-pin/charm-wall entries are better treated as avoidance or alternate-risk profile states than as broad vetoes inside the current profitable profiles.
next_experiments.name: Charm Pin Avoid Dormant Split Probe
next_experiments.primary_metric: Combined charm/pin worst MAE improves while combined charm/pin PnL retention is >=90% and total PnL retention is >=98%.
next_experiments.risk: Small sample and profile overlap could remove convex charm-wall winners.

next_experiments.config_bias: Run a surgical extended-VWAP rejection boundary experiment only if scoped to the near-miss family; avoid global ES-VWAP max-distance caps or setup floors that would block protected extended winners.
next_experiments.goal: Validate whether the enabled extended-VWAP rejection veto can catch the -527/-403 family without broad pruning.
next_experiments.hypothesis: Near-miss thresholds explain all current bad-MAE rows, but only a narrow profile-aware nudge has acceptable PnL retention.
next_experiments.name: Extended VWAP Near-Miss Boundary Validation
next_experiments.primary_metric: Worst MAE improves toward <= -403 with total PnL retained >=97% and protected extended-VWAP winner PnL retained >=90%.
next_experiments.risk: The same signature overlaps fast winners; over-nudging will lower score despite better apparent MAE.

next_experiments.config_bias: Do not expand pullback_long TP or VWAP distance; instead test a separate deep-heat observation split or keep current core untouched. Any config-only probe should be explicitly profile-scoped and evaluated on protected pullback winners.
next_experiments.goal: Protect the highest-PnL profile while researching delayed-recovery tails.
next_experiments.hypothesis: pullback_long is the main edge, but its weaker-structure/deferred-profit subset may be separable only by early path or companion logic.
next_experiments.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Split Research
next_experiments.primary_metric: pullback_long PnL retention >=90%, total PnL/exposure hour flat or better, and pullback worst MAE improves without trade starvation.
next_experiments.risk: Broad structure tightening can remove profitable pullbacks and repeat prior mixed/hurt outcomes.

next_experiments.config_bias: Freeze charm_wall_breakaway_long exits after the failed compression test; only allow research that separates pin-risk entries from normal breakaway continuation.
next_experiments.goal: Avoid damaging a small but high-convexity payoff profile.
next_experiments.hypothesis: The charm-wall edge is real but too sparse for target compression; any improvement must come from entry-state split, not smaller targets.
next_experiments.name: Charm Wall Convexity Preservation Holdout
next_experiments.primary_metric: Profile PnL/exposure remains >200, total net profit >=98% of leader, and no worsening in worst MAE.
next_experiments.risk: Small sample: one removed winner can dominate the run result.

research_notes: The optimizer is plateaued: multiple top runs are identical at score 9594.49, $7125.8 PnL, 107 trades, and -527 worst MAE. That means more small threshold nudges are likely exhausted unless they open a new route or isolate a regime. The best next work is profile discovery: 1DTE companion routing, dormant charm/pin avoid activation, and code-proposed early-path classifiers. Avoid broad filters based on setup score, ES structure score, or ES-VWAP distance because the analysis repeatedly shows protected winners living in the same feature space as bad-MAE trades.
risk_controls: Reject experiments that reduce total net profit below 98% of leader unless worst MAE improves materially and trade count remains stable.
Protect fast_winners, low_mae_winners, high_pnl_winners, and extended_vwap_winners fingerprints from blunt entry filters.
Require profile attribution for any dormant activation: standalone PnL, cannibalized trades, combined profile MAE, and protected-entry overlap.
Do not repeat failed 1DTE breakout quality tightening; test a companion route instead.
Do not compress charm_wall_breakaway_long exits again without a distinct entry split signal.
Treat no-stop-loss 100% win rate as path-risk camouflage; primary validation must include worst MAE, average MAE, exposure hours, and PnL/exposure hour.
